list.name: vo
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.vo FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE m.activity = 'grid' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.site FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE m.activity = 'grid' AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(m.grid_efficiency)::numeric, 3) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND m.activity = 'grid' AND m.grid_efficiency IS NOT NULL AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT ROUND(AVG(m.avg_ci_g)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND m.activity = 'grid' AND m.avg_ci_g IS NOT NULL AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT ROUND(AVG(m.avg_pue)::numeric, 3) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND m.activity = 'grid' AND m.avg_pue IS NOT NULL AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.bucket_15m, $__interval), m.site AS metric, AVG(m.grid_efficiency) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND m.activity = 'grid' AND m.grid_efficiency IS NOT NULL AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.bucket_15m, $__interval), m.site AS metric, AVG(m.avg_ci_g) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND m.activity = 'grid' AND m.avg_ci_g IS NOT NULL AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(m.bucket_15m, $__interval), m.site AS metric, AVG(m.avg_pue) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND m.activity = 'grid' AND m.avg_pue IS NOT NULL AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT m.vo, m.site, SUM(COALESCE(m.records,0)) AS records, ROUND(AVG(m.grid_efficiency)::numeric, 3) AS avg_cee, ROUND(AVG(m.avg_ci_g)::numeric, 2) AS avg_ci_gco2_kwh, ROUND(AVG(m.avg_pue)::numeric, 3) AS avg_pue, SUM(COALESCE(m.green_score_records,0)) AS green_score_records, ROUND((SUM(m.green_score * m.green_score_records) / NULLIF(SUM(m.green_score_records),0))::numeric, 6) AS green_score FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND m.activity = 'grid' AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY green_score DESC NULLS LAST, records DESC LIMIT 200;
